title: Yacht club hosts open day on Island Lake
description: GEORGE NEWS - The George Lakes Yacht Club...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The George Lakes Yacht Club will host an open day on Sunday 25 January, from 11:00 to 14:00, at the clubhouse on Island Lake.


> Members of the public are invited to enjoy a fun morning on the water, with the opportunity to sail with experienced and friendly club sailors and experience the joy of being out on the lake.


Those interested are encouraged to register in advance.

For more information, contact Mandy on 083 256 5724, Cindy on 082 490 9159 or Sonja on 082 446 4879.

Scan to enter.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
